Description

Our most economical do-everything toolkit. The Essential Electronics Toolkit is what you need for the most essential electronics repairs—like screen and battery swaps—and everything you need for most household DIY fixes.
Get started in electronics repair with all the bits and precision tools to handle your most urgent screen breaks and battery swaps. Or simply upgrade your home DIY toolkit with what you need to service door knobs, home appliances, eyeglasses, and more.

Thoughtfully-Designed Driver

Our lightweight plastic 4mm driver offers an ergonomic grip and a magnetic bit holder for effortless screw management. The smooth swivel cap cleverly integrates storage for up to three bits and a SIM Eject Tool.

Tools For All The Basics

The Essential Electronics Toolkit (EET) is your go-to for tech repair essentials. It's packed with precision tools such as the Angled Tweezers, Spudger, Jimmy, and Opening Picks. Add in the driver and 16 essential bits, and you have everything you need to get started.

Efficient Tool Organization

The magnetized case with a custom foam insert ensures every tool and bit stays organized. The interior lid also serves as a tray for small parts, all in a sleek, portable design.

5 days ago
Perfect for fixing the joystick in my joy on. It’s always a better experience to have the right tools for the job than making the wrong thing work.
6 days ago
It solved my daughters problems with the screen. I did have to order the tools with it and was glad I did as you really need them to be able to move all other components (battery, main board, connectors, wires, camera's) from the old casing into the new casing. The screen and casing are delivered as one component and as such everything needed to move. So the tools work fine, be carefull with the stress you apply to the pliers as they can bend easily (can also be bend back, but that will make it brittle and probably make it break off at some point)
